channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: From ‘Confessions II’ Reveal to Sabrina Carpenter Coachella Cameo, Madonna Is Back On the Dance Floor
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the Billboard Pop Shop Podcast. I'm your host, Katie, and I'm here with Keith. We're diving into the latest pop news, and it's been a wild week.
Keith: That's right. Madonna just announced Confessions II, the sequel to her 2005 classic, and things are moving fast. She's already dropped the first song, "I Feel So Free," and made a surprise appearance at Coachella with Sabrina Carpenter.
Katie: They even performed a duet of "Like a Prayer" together. It's got everyone buzzing about a potential collaboration on the new album. We're excited to see what's next.
Keith: In other chart news, Ella Langley has debuted at number one on the Billboard 200 with her album Dandelion. And her single "Choosin' Texas" is still holding strong at number one on the Billboard Hot 100.
Katie: Also, Lady Gaga and Doechii's new song "Runway" is making its mark on the charts. And after Coachella's first weekend, headliners like Justin Bieber and Sabrina Carpenter are seeing a big boost in their chart numbers.
Keith: All this and more on this week's episode. Tune in for the latest pop news, chart stats, and stories. You can stream us on Billboard.com or download us on Apple Podcasts or your favorite provider.
[Outro music plays]
Host: Thanks for listening to the Billboard Pop Shop Podcast. Join us next time for more pop news and analysis.
